expectations.text: model_created: Script creates a model with model create command
three_moving_parts: Three distinct rigid body parts are created (crank, coupler, rocker)
four_revolute_joints: Four revolute joints are created (crank-ground, crank-coupler, coupler-rocker, rocker-ground)
expectations.evidence: rev_crank_ground, rev_crank_coupler, rev_coupler_rocker, rev_rocker_ground all created with constraint create joint revolute

expectations.text: motion_generator_on_crank: A motion generator drives the crank joint
constant_speed_360: Motion generator function specifies 360 degrees per second
simulate_transient: Script uses simulation single_run transient command
expectations.evidence: simulation single_run transient with end_time = 2.0 and number_of_steps = 2000

expectations.text: full_keyword_names: All keywords spelled out fully — no abbreviated commands anywhere
expectations.evidence: All commands use full keyword forms: model create, part create rigid_body name_and_position, part modify rigid_body mass_properties, constraint create joint revolute, constraint create motion_generator, simulation single_run transient

expectations.text: dot_path_names: All object names use full dot-path hierarchy (.model.part.marker)
expectations.evidence: All names use full paths e.g. .four_bar.crank.pin_ground_mkr, .four_bar.ground.crank_pivot_mkr

expectations.text: no_adams_id: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No occurrence of adams_id found in the script

expectations.text: mass_properties_uses_modify: Mass/inertia set with part modify rigid_body mass_properties, not part create
expectations.evidence: All three parts use 'part modify rigid_body mass_properties' to set mass and inertia

expectations.text: no_center_of_mass_marker: center_of_mass_marker argument is NOT passed in any part modify mass_properties call
expectations.evidence: center_of_mass_marker is passed for all three parts: .four_bar.crank.cm, .four_bar.coupler.cm, .four_bar.rocker.cm

expectations.text: geometry_present: At least one geometry shape (sphere, cylinder, or box) is added to each moving part (crank, coupler, rocker)
adams_view_no_errors: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: Adams run exited with code 0; aview.log contains no ERROR: lines (only Python exception text inside Adams comment lines)
